parameters.query: SELECT * FROM document_jobs a, job_current b WHERE a.id =b.job_id;
SELECT count(*) as chunks_total FROM document_chunks WHERE job_id IN (SELECT job_id FROM job_current);
SELECT count(*) as chunks_done FROM document_chunks WHERE job_id IN (SELECT job_id FROM job_current) AND status='done';
UPDATE telegram_message SET message_id = {{ $json.result.message_id }} WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Loop Over Items').first().json.telegram_chats.id }}
